title: activate_subscription_atomic: CASE-based subscription max — correctly extends rather than replaces existing subscription on renewal
description: relay/src/store.rs activate_subscription_atomic uses ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET expires_at = CASE WHEN excluded.expires_at > subscriptions.expires_at THEN excluded.expires_at ELSE subscriptions.expires_at END. This correctly extends an already-active subscription rather than replacing it. A naive UPDATE SET expires_at = excluded.expires_at would reset the expiry to exactly 'now + N days' even if the user already had a longer subscription. The CASE-based MAX is the correct semantic for subscription stacking. A contributor might 'simplify' this to a plain UPDATE — the decision record should make clear why the CASE is load-bearing.
